sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30550" key="e)gxei/moros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγχεί-μορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30550.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dealing death with the spear</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4099.tlg001:630:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">630.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
